title: USD Specializes Composition Spec Coverage Ledger

normative_source.rule: Only the AOUSD core specification at aousd/specifications-public v1.0.1 is normative for this ledger. This ledger covers only direct specializes namespace composition.

status_values.implemented: In scope for the specializes-namespace-source contract and covered by goldens.
status_values.partial: A bounded subset is included and later contracts must extend it.
status_values.deferred: Specified behavior intentionally not included in this first specializes contract.
status_values.out_of_scope: Belongs to another subsystem or future skill.

coverage_rules: The provider composes direct specializes arcs and delegates stage traversal to usd-stage-population.
The provider consumes a base namespace source, not parser-local USDA syntax.
A generated target must include bounded recursive direct specializes expansion and implied upstream specializes arcs represented by the base source before claiming this contract.
A generated target must not claim full value resolution, specializes authored inside selected variants, or unbounded recursive behavior from this provider.

obligations: Read direct specialize path items from the base source-visible specializes field.
Map the specialized source prim and descendants onto the specialize-authoring prim path.
Preserve target opinions as stronger than specialized source opinions.
Resolve specialized source paths through the applicable source-visible composed or layer-stack context rather than only through the layer where the specializes arc was authored.
Use the same namespace mapping behavior as inherits.
Map properties under the specialized source prim to corresponding properties under the specialize-authoring prim path.
Reject property paths in specialize path items.
Diagnose a missing specialized prim source path.
Include the specialize-authoring prim path and specialized source path in diagnostics.
Treat all opinions on the specialize-authoring prim as stronger than specialized opinions in this bounded source.
Require specialized opinions to be modeled as globally weaker than local, inherits, variants, relocates, references, and payloads in LIVERPS.

Place usd-specializes-namespace-source after usd-inherits-namespace-source and before usd-variant-namespace-source in graph evaluation order so variant selection can observe specialized non-variant opinions.
Require usd-variant-namespace-source to insert selected variant opinions above specializes opinions when both are present.
Document that evaluation order is distinct from LIVERPS field-strength order.
items.deferred_reason: Full arbitration against payload opinions remains deferred to usd-composition-arbitrator, which merges payload opinion sources with the terminal non-variant source.

obligations: When a specializes arc authored in a weaker referenced or otherwise introduced layer stack targets an absolute source path, include stronger upstream layer-stack opinions at that same source path as implied specialized contributors.
Preserve source-visible layer strength among implied specialized contributors while keeping them in the specializes family.
Do not diagnose absence of an implied contributor when no upstream layer-stack site contributes at the specialized source path.
Expand specializes paths authored on specialized source prims transitively.
Order a source prim's own opinions stronger than opinions introduced by that source prim's specializes arcs.
Detect recursive specializes cycles using semantic paths and mapping context; diagnose cycles without unbounded recursion or crashes.
Expose specialized composed prims and properties through the namespace-source boundary.
Allow usd-stage-population to populate specialized prims and properties without evaluating specializes itself.
Preserve composed child and property ordering when consumed by stage population.
